creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Sun, 12 Mar 2000 dozprompt@onsea.com wrote:

> Makefile generation erroniously locates the Qt object compiler 'moc' in /usr/bin, when it currently resides in /usr/X11R6/bin, and subsequently fails building.
> 

Is /usr/X11R6/bin in your path when you build the port.  If not, the
configure script will default to /usr/bin as moc's path instead of the
actual path.

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
